brand.title: Brand
brand.description: Brand name as provided in the input.

engine.title: AI engine
engine.description: Engine that produced this result (chatgpt, perplexity, gemini, claude).

query.title: Query
query.description: The buyer-intent query that was sent to the engine.

brand_mentioned.title: Brand mentioned
brand_mentioned.description: Whether the brand appeared anywhere in the response.

mention_count.title: Mention count
mention_count.description: Number of times the brand (or an alias) appeared in the response.

position_score.title: Position score
position_score.description: 1–10: how early the brand was first mentioned. 10 = first, 1 = last, 0 = not mentioned.

competitor_mentions.title: Competitor mentions
competitor_mentions.description: Map of competitor name → mention count for all competitors in the input.

citations.title: Citations
citations.description: URLs cited by the AI, as {url, domain} objects.

cited_domains.title: Cited domains
cited_domains.description: Deduplicated list of domains cited by the AI in this response.

response_snippet.title: Response snippet
response_snippet.description: First 400 characters of the AI's response.

response_truncated.title: Response truncated
response_truncated.description: True if the engine hit the token limit. A missing brand on a truncated row is inconclusive.
